name: FAI_SAM_ANOMALY_PROCESSOUT_V
query: select anomaly_detection_id, detection_key, detail_info, a.detection_object_id object_id, b."RAW_PROCESSOUT_ID",b."CONTEXT",b."KEY",b."VALUE",b."DATE_DATA",b."STATUS",b."CONSUMER_DATA_KEY",b."ANOMALY_LOOP",b."CREATED_BY",b."CREATION_DATE",b."LAST_UPDATED_BY",b."LAST_UPDATE_DATE",b."LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN",b."ENTERPRISE_ID",b."RAW_LOAD_ID" from fai_sam_anomaly_detection a, fai_sam_raw_processout b where a.detection_object_id = b.raw_processout_id and detection_key = 'FAI_SAM_COMPARE_PROCESSOUT_DATA'
